name: Carrier Based Pricing Shipping Option Setup

"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The shipping wizard walks you through all the steps required to configure your carrier rates. To set up your shipping options using the wizard:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the green "}, {"text": "Add new shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button from the top right hand side."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup1.05T5g00000sz5UREAY.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup1.05T5g00000sz5UREAY.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Set up shipping carrier based pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup2.05T5g00000sz8HwEAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup2.05T5g00000sz8HwEAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 245}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make sure you have your API credentials handy and click the "}, {"text": "Continue", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be in "}, {"text": "Step 2", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Enter the required account details. The details required change slightly with every carrier, but most include and API key or, username, and password. Once complete, click the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be in "}, {"text": "Step 3", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Select the services you wish to provide to your customers. Once select, click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup3.05T5g00000sz8IfEAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup3.05T5g00000sz8IfEAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 246}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be in "}, {"text": "Step 4", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Here you can optionally rename the services and add a description. Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup4.05T5g00000sz6hPEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup4.05T5g00000sz6hPEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image4", "width": 700, "height": 246}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be in "}, {"text": "Step 5", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Here you can toggle the option to show visibility to customers and staff and set PO BOX availability. Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup5.05T5g00000sz6XUEAY.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup5.05T5g00000sz6XUEAY.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image5", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be in "}, {"text": "Step 6", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Here you can optionally provide a discount based on the customers overall spend amount, eg. If a customer spends over $100, they get free shipping. Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup6.05T5g00000sz89UEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup6.05T5g00000sz89UEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image6", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be in "}, {"text": "Step 7", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Choose whether you'll be using a standard printer to print consignment labels or a thermal printer. Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup7.05T5g00000sz8L5EAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup7.05T5g00000sz8L5EAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image7", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll now be in "}, {"text": "Step 8", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Review your final shipping setup. If you need to make any changes, click on the "}, {"text": "Previous Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, alternatively click "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": " to activate your new shipping option."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup8.05T5g00000sz8LyEAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CarrierBasedPricingShippingOptionSetup8.05T5g00000sz8LyEAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image8", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your shipping option is now set up. We recommend you test it on your webstore with different postcodes to ensure it works as expected."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
